\tzpentry{ID4839}{Angular Velocity Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4839 introduces Angular Velocity Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\Omega(g) \\approx \\sum_{n=0}^{\\infty} a_n g^n + \\sum_{k=1}^{\\infty} e^{-k S/g} \\left( \\sum_{m=0}^{\\infty} b_{k,m} g^m \\right) + \\text{Log-terms}$$
